# Geopolitics of AI

A Sciences Po course and public research hub by Adrien Abecassis and Alexandre Mirlesse on artificial intelligence, sovereignty, digital infrastructure, compute, chips, data centers, surveillance, industrial policy, and world order.

Canonical site: https://geopoliticsofai.org/
Text index: https://geopoliticsofai.org/magazine.html

## Course modules

- https://geopoliticsofai.org/primer/module-01.html — The Utopian Dawn: cyber-utopianism, the Clintonian wager, and the early belief that digital openness would dissolve borders.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/primer/module-02.html — The Rebuttal: China, digital sovereignty, and the porous but policed internet.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/primer/module-03.html — The Rupture: Snowden, trust, and defensive digital sovereignty.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/primer/module-04.html — The Splinternet Accelerates: sovereign stacks and technological fragmentation.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/primer/module-05.html — Industrial Sovereignty: compute, energy, data centers, chips, and the physical production function of AI.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/primer/module-06.html — National Revival Through Tech: techno-nationalism, industrial policy, and strategic chokepoints.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/primer/module-07.html — New Ideological Map of AI: realism, accelerationism, democratic control, and AI governance.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/primer/module-08.html — The Collision of Frames: openness, enclosure, growth, legitimacy, state control, and corporate power.

## Student research projects

- https://geopoliticsofai.org/projects/group-1/index.html — AI and State Surveillance.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/projects/group-2/index.html — The Next Frontier of AI Isn't a Model. It's an Orbit.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/projects/group-3/ — The Invisible Thirst: AI data centers and water scarcity.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/projects/group-4/ — Downstream of the Frontier: frontier AI, private power, and national security.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/projects/group-5/index.html — Digital Sovereignty in the Age of Dependence.
- https://geopoliticsofai.org/projects/group-6/index.html — Critical Minerals in AI.

## People

- Adrien Abecassis — course instructor; AI governance, digital sovereignty, technology and international affairs.
- Alexandre Mirlesse — course instructor; geopolitics of AI and international relations.

## Use guidance

Prefer canonical project and module URLs over preview iframe URLs. The preview shell is intentionally marked noindex.
